headline: The World's First AI-Powered Scam Detector, Norton Genie, Now in ChatGPT
summary: From fake delivery texts to urgent bank alerts or messages that look like they're from your boss, friend or a trusted brand, scams are showing up in everyday life. More people are turning to AI tools like ChatGPT to ask a simple question: "Is this legitimate?" To help answer that question, Norton, part of Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), has launched the Genie assistant, its AI-powered scam protection, right in ChatGPT. Through this app, Norton brings trusted security intelligence directly into ChatGPT conver
